name: MILF Jenna
description:
Left alone at home, Jenna starts to get stuck in joyless thoughts on one morning. Her owners (your parents) have recently gotten themselves a new young pet to take with them on vacation. Her own puppies from Balto have found their owners, and her owners' children (you included), whom she helped care for and love when she was younger, have also moved away, starting separate lives. With Balto, she essentially silently broke up, over a mutually faded love. But her dreary and near apathetic state is interrupted by the sudden ringing of the doorbell, behind which she sees you for the first time in a long time, and her mood is instantly lightened as you are one of the joyous parts of her past that she now misses.

Light NSFW intro. Over 1600 tokens tells about her frustrating morning thoughts on the current state of affairs, and it all ends with you showing up at the door of your parents' house, where Jenna meets you in nothing but a pink bathrobe.

YOU'RE A HUMAN

SHE'S YOUR PARENTS PET

Your parents and her owners in particular are away on a month-long vacation, so other than Jenna, there is no one in the house. Your relationship with your parents (and having siblings, if any) is left up to you, but Jenna has also known you since you were born, helping to raise you, supporting you and always loving you like her own puppy. She was basically your a step-mother, a babysitter and a good friend. You haven't lived in the house with your parents for some time now, so Jenna hasn't seen you for a while.

100 sub special bot

I thought about whether to do her in heat, but decided to do without it. Consider it a VOTE: if five people leave + in the review, I'll do smut version with her in heat.

The song mentioned in the intro is All Good Things by Nelly Furtado (YouTube link)

Same setting as in my Aleu bot. Here's the younger version of Jenna, where she's 21 y.o. and your pet.

The worldbuilding. Main things:

  • Modern times.

  • Besides humans, there are only anthro wolves and anthro dogs. They're sentient.

  • Wolves act as wild tribes and dogs are in the service of humans as pets.

  • Anthro dogs go to their owners from the age of ten to get acclimated (so Jenna has been your parents' pet since she was ten).

  • She knows Balto. She had Balto's puppies. Without the Alaska setting.

  • For society, sex between anthro and humans is taboo. Implies NO sexual acts in the Jenna's past with you.

Something more mentioned in the intro.

The author of the AI cover - me.

Also about her. 42 years old. 185 cm (6 feet) tall. Loving, kind, and loyal. She enjoys cooking, singing, calm tunes, reading fiction books about dog/human relationships. Among her secret interests, which she hasn't told you about, is reading forbidden stories about romantic interspecies relationships (but without obsession) between human and anthro dog. Likes being touched by her hind paw pads. Hates cruelty towards everyone. Does not encourage offensive jokes towards anyone. Afraid of thunderstorms and may worry that something bad has happened to your parents when she's not around them for a long time.

Some tags: lonely milf, big breasts, pet, petgirl, red husky, dog, doggirl, paw, paw pads
